steps.name: Verify Home Page and Open Account Page
Scroll into view locator('*[aria-label="Open account panel"]')
Wait for selector locator('*[aria-label="Open account panel"]')
Scroll into view locator('p:has-text("Welcome! You have signed up successfully.")')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('p:has-text("Welcome! You have signed up successfully.")')
Scroll into view locator('*[aria-label="Open account panel"]')
Wait for selector locator('*[aria-label="Open account panel"]')
Scroll into view locator('p:has-text("Signed out successfully.")')
Scroll into view locator('*[aria-label="Open account panel"]')
Wait for selector locator('*[aria-label="Open account panel"]')
Scroll into view locator('p:has-text("Signed in successfully.")')
Scroll into view getByRole('link', { name: 'Blue Rucksack' })
Scroll into view getByRole('button', { name: 'Add To Cart' })
Scroll into view getByRole('button', { name: 'Save and Continue' })
Scroll into view getByRole('button', { name: 'Save and Continue' })
Scroll into view locator('h4:has-text("Thanks Test for your order!")')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('h4:has-text("Thanks Test for your order!")')
